title: bupleurum lancifolium var. subacaule
intro: Bupleurum lancifolium var. subacaule is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a type of Bupleurum plant, specifically a variety of the lance-leaved Bupleurum. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to modulate the immune system. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting liver function, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Bupleurum lancifolium var. subacaule can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
